title: Organizing widgets on dashboards / adding labels and lines
excerpt: From what I can tell, Monday doesn’t have the ability yet to insert lines, graphics, text labels, etc. in the dashboard to improve the presentation.  This would be helpful to us in organizing the widgets on our boards.  …

posts.author: BruceB (Bruce Baldwin)
posts.cookedHtml: From what I can tell, Monday doesn’t have the ability yet to insert lines, graphics, text labels, etc. in the dashboard to improve the presentation. This would be helpful to us in organizing the widgets on our boards. There is a text type widget, but it makes you put in a title and description. I don’t see anything where you can add things like lines. Has this been requested before? Anything in the works? Workaround exist?

posts.author: Nico1 (Nicolas Fuchs)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, we need that too… Any solutions? Embedded app?

posts.author: Urszula (Urszula Janeczko)
posts.cookedHtml: it’s 2025 and we still don’t have it?
